stories.title: Add DB schema field for analysis processing state (pending/processing/complete/failed) and quality warnings JSON column
Persist in-progress analysis state to DB so navigating away does not lose work
Wire createAnalysisInputSchema from shared/schema.ts into the analysis.create tRPC router for server-side validation
Deduplicate PHASE_ORDER constant - remove from ProCompare.tsx and import from shared config
Refactor Upload.tsx 9 useState hooks into a single useReducer
Move landmark data from inline TEXT blob in SQLite to write-once .json files on disk, store only file path in DB
Implement lazy-loading of landmark data - only fetch when replay player component mounts
Fix history filter pill colors - replace hardcoded color #000 with theme-aware contrast colors
Consolidate distance() utility - unify the 2D and 3D versions in swingAnalyzer.ts and shotClassifier.ts
Add vitest setup and unit tests for swingAnalyzer core functions
Add unit tests for shotClassifier prediction and label mapping
Add integration tests for all tRPC routers using supertest
Add pino structured logging on server side with request ID tracking
Add React error boundary with fallback UI on client side
Add session-based auth middleware with login/register flow
Add E2E smoke test with Playwright for upload-analyze-view flow
